disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset 12 hours ago of severe pelvic and lower-back pain that is different from and far worse than her usual pain pattern
trigger_question_examples: When did this pain start and how is it different from your usual pain?
What is the pain like today compared to normal?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on suddenly last night. I get bad pelvic pain normally but this is a completely different level — sharp, everywhere, and it just keeps getting worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Persistent nausea and vomiting with difficulty keeping fluids down
trigger_question_examples: Have you been feeling sick or vomiting?
Are you able to keep fluids down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I keep throwing up and I can't really keep anything down, not even water.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain spikes triggered by bladder filling and by bowel movements
trigger_question_examples: Does anything in particular make the pain spike?
What happens when your bladder is full or when you open your bowels?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It gets much worse when my bladder is full and when I go to the toilet — those really set it off.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing gynaecological pain condition (endometriosis) and reliable use of a continuous hormonal contraceptive
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any ongoing health conditions?
Are you on any regular medications or contraception?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I have endometriosis and I take a hormone pill continuously to try to manage it — I take it every day without a break.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has already taken the maximum available over-the-counter analgesia (naproxen and paracetamol-codeine) with no relief
trigger_question_examples: What have you already taken for the pain and did it help?
How much pain relief have you used today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've taken as much naproxen and Panadeine as I'm allowed and it has done absolutely nothing.

trigger_question_examples: Have you had any vaginal bleeding?
Any bleeding that isn't your normal pattern?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't had any bleeding.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has not fainted or passed out and the abdomen has not gone hard and rigid — screened negative for haemorrhage and peritonism at this point
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt faint or actually passed out when you stand?
Has your tummy gone hard, rigid or board-like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel awful and my heart is racing but I haven't actually fainted, and my belly is sore but it hasn't gone hard.
